svg.title: NexChat use case diagram
svg.desc: Three actors — Guest, User, System — connected to their respective use cases via association lines

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does registration work in NexChat?')
sendPrompt('How does login work in NexChat?')
sendPrompt('How does the forgot password OTP flow work?')
sendPrompt('How do channels work in NexChat?')
sendPrompt('How do you join and leave a room?')
sendPrompt('How does the typing indicator work?')
sendPrompt('How does the message cache work?')
sendPrompt('How do you create a new channel?')
sendPrompt('What does the cache stats panel show?')
sendPrompt('How does the system seed default channels?')
sendPrompt('How does the cache sweep work?')
sendPrompt('How does the health check keepalive work?')
